connection_summary.text: The Gradient Descent Update requires the gradient.

why_connected.text: The update uses the gradient to determine its descent direction.

learning_value.text: This link helps connect a calculus object to its role inside an optimisation update.

connection_summary.text: Ridge Regression extends Ordinary Least Squares.

why_connected.text: It adds a coefficient penalty to the ordinary least-squares objective.

learning_value.text: This link helps organize Ridge Regression as a modification of an existing fitting method.

connection_summary.text: The First-Order Taylor Formula formalizes the First-Order Taylor Approximation.

why_connected.text: The displayed formula is the mathematical expression of that approximation.

learning_value.text: This link helps interpret the formula as an operational statement of the approximation.

connection_summary.text: Gradient Descent contrasts with the Newton Optimisation Method.

why_connected.text: Gradient Descent controls its move with a step size, while Newton optimisation adjusts the move using curvature.

learning_value.text: This contrast helps compare how first-order and curvature-adjusted updates are constructed.
